description: 本周（2026年4月19日-4月25日）GitHub Trending 中 AI/ML/DL/LLM 相关热门开源项目 Top 10，按本周新增 star 数降序排列

projects.name: forrestchang/andrej-karpathy-skills
projects.description: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.

projects.name: NousResearch/hermes-agent
projects.description: The agent that grows with you

projects.name: thedotmack/claude-mem
projects.description: A Claude Code plugin that automatically captures everything Claude does during your coding sessions, compresses it with AI (using Claude's agent-sdk), and injects relevant context back into future sessions.

projects.name: microsoft/markitdown
projects.description: Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.

projects.name: multica-ai/multica
projects.description: The open-source managed agents platform. Turn coding agents into real teammates — assign tasks, track progress, compound skills.

projects.name: Alishahryar1/free-claude-code
projects.description: Use claude-code for free in the terminal, VSCode extension or via discord like openclaw

projects.name: jamiepine/voicebox
projects.description: The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.

projects.name: lsdefine/GenericAgent
projects.description: Self-evolving agent: grows skill tree from 3.3K-line seed, achieving full system control with 6x less token consumption

projects.name: openai/openai-agents-python
projects.description: A lightweight, powerful framework for multi-agent workflows

projects.name: sansan0/TrendRadar
projects.description: AI-driven public opinion & trend monitor with multi-platform aggregation, RSS, and smart alerts. 告别信息过载，你的 AI 舆情监控助手与热点筛选工具！
